title: Ombudsmen Act 1975 — New Zealand Public Service Complaint Investigation
description: New Zealand legislation establishing the Ombudsmen office and its authority to investigate complaints against public service agencies, state enterprises, and related organizations. Defines complaint procedures, investigation powers, confidentiality requirements, and oversight mechanisms for public sector accountability.
